query:
INSERT INTO deployments
           (id, gpu_slot_id, gpu_group_id, server_id, registry_tag_id, gitlab_instance_id, image_ref, image_digest,
            created_by, state, container_name, mem_limit_mb, created_at, updated_at)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'PENDING', ?, ?, ?, ?)
